name: Allomon

signature_move.name: Dino Burst
signature_move.description: Spews out an ultra-high temperature wind.

description: An Armor-level Dinosaur Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Courage ". Particularly ferocious among Dinosaur Digimon, it is in a hostile relationship with fellow Dinosaur-type Tyranomon . Allomon's special features are having powerful leg strength, and being able to run at blistering speed by tilting its head down and taking a horizontal stance. Its Special Move is spewing out an ultra-high temperature wind ( Dino Burst ).
